title: En Kanmani Un Kadhali Lyrics Chittu Kuruvi
stanzas:
en kanmani un kadhali 
ilamaangani
unai paarthadhum
sirikindrathe 
naan sonna jokai kaetu
naanamo 
nee nagaichuvai 
mannan illaiyo

en mannavan un kadhalan
enai paarthathum
orraayiram kadhai solgran
ammammaa innum ketka thoondumo
nee rasikindra 
kanni illaiyo

en kanmani ...

iru maangal pesum podhu
mozhi yethammaa..
pirar kadhil ketpadharkkum
vazhi yethammaa..

oru jodi serndhu sellum
payanangalil
uravandri veru illai
gavangalil

ila maamayil 
arugaamayil
vandhaadum velai
inbam kodi endru 
anubavam sollavillayo

en mannavan un kadhalan
enai paarthathum
orraayiram kadhai solgraan
ammammaa innum ketka thoondumo
rasikindra kanni illaiyo

en kanmani ...

medhuvaaga unnai konjam 
thodavendume
irumeni engum viralgal
pada vendume

adharkkaaga neram ondru
vara vendume
adaiyaala chinnam
ondru tharavendume

iru tholilum manamaalaigal
kondaadum kaalam endru
koodumendru 
thavikkindra thavippennavo. 

en kanmani un kadhali 
ilamaangani
unai paarthadhum
sirikindrathe 
naan sonna jokai kaetu
naanamo 
nee nagaichuvai 
mannan illaiyo

en mannavan un kadhalan
enai paarthathum
orraayiram kadhai solgran
ammammaa innum ketka thoondumo
nee rasikindra 
kanni illaiyo

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the joy of love, highlighting the beauty of connection between two souls.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Chittu Kuruvi.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by renowned artists P. Susheela and S.P. Balasubramaniam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released in the year 1978.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In En Kanmani Un Kadhali, the protagonists express their heartfelt emotions through a beautiful melody that encapsulates the essence of love. The song unfolds in a romantic context, where the characters reflect on their feelings and the joy of being together. With its soothing tune and poignant lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. This classic piece remains a cherished gem in Tamil cinema, resonating with anyone who has experienced the magic of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Kanmani Un Kadhali from Chittu Kuruvi is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of P. Susheela and S.P. Balasubramaniam, this song resonates with anyone who has experienced the sweetness of romance. The masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja adds a rich layer of nostalgia, making it a must-listen for fans of classic Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: Oh my dear, without your love, just seeing you makes me smile. I wonder if you are listening to the stories I tell, my beloved, who sees me and tells a thousand tales. Will you still listen? Oh my dear, when two people talk, how much can they express? How much can others understand from their love? In the experiences of a couple, there is no other joy like this. My beloved, who sees me and tells a thousand tales, will you still listen?
